tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Hansen pulls Iowa State closer with a TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Iowa State's Jaylon Jackson takes the check down 27 yards for TD
videos.description: Iowa State pulls even closer as Jaylon Jackson takes the short pass into the end zone for a 27-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Iowa State’s Jaylon Jackson takes the check down 27 yards for TD) 2024/11/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kansas puts game away with a Mello Dotson pick-six
videos.description: Mello Dotson intercepts the pass and returns it for a touchdown to put Kansas up 17 late in the fourth quarter.
